title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CONGREGATIONS HELPING PEOPLE UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with past-due electric, trash and recycling, and water bills. Must have a shut-off or disconnect notice. Assistance is limited, dependent on available funding, and available once per household. 1977 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97303 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 391-4365 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 391-4365 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Disconnect bill or shut-off notice, photo ID, proof of income (wages, SSI/SSDI, TANF, unemployment benefits) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Salvation Army building. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Trash/Recycling Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATE AND OREGON ID CARD ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE TRANSPORTATION - LOCAL BUS PASS ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONGREGATIONS HELPING PEOPLE
